offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 client invoices/month, manual data entry delays tax filings causing late submissions. We automate the conversion of billing records into tax filings instead of manual data entry and spreadsheet management.
problem: manual data entry delays tax filings
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums where firms share tools
try_it: Let users try manual data entry on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Enable CSV import for existing client data
Provide one-click export for simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
